description: 记录项目维护者对我们 PR/Issue 的回应和态度分析

target.title: feat: add prompt subcommand, --model flag, doctor command, and request timeout

interactions.raw_content: Looks good to me, really nice work on this. Merging now.
interactions.analysis: 作者高度认可代码质量，使用了'Looks good to me'和'really nice work'等强烈正面词汇，并在评论后立即合并，显示对贡献者的高度信任
implications: 作者对我们的代码质量有很高评价
prompt CLI 功能方向符合项目规划
快速合并模式：无修改要求直接通过

target.title: fix: handle null arrays in OpenAI-compatible API responses

interactions.raw_content: Looks good to me! Appreciate the quick fix here.
interactions.analysis: 作者认可修复方案，特别赞赏了快速响应（'quick fix'）。这是对 PR #38 (被关闭) 的改进版重新提交并成功。说明：修复方向正确，只是之前的版本可能有其他问题
implications: null array 修复方向是正确的
快速迭代改进会被认可
'Appreciate the quick fix' - 作者重视响应速度
PR #38 被关闭可能是因为实现细节而非方向问题

target.title: fix: make --log-level work in prompt mode

interactions.raw_content: Oh, I totally missed that! Good catch!
interactions.analysis: 作者承认自己遗漏了这个bug（'totally missed that!'), 并高度赞赏发现问题的敏锐度（'Good catch!'）。这是一种非常正面的互动模式 - 作者愿意承认疏忽并感谢贡献者的细心
implications: 我们发现了作者自己没注意到的 bug - 展示了技术洞察力
'Good catch!' 是非常高的赞誉 - 意味着我们比维护者更仔细
PR 很可能会被合并（正面评论 + 承认遗漏）
prompt mode 的 log-level 问题确实是一个容易被忽略的 edge case

target.title: fix: handle null arrays in OpenAI-compatible API responses (v1)

interactions.analysis: PR #38 是 #40 的前一版本，被关闭但未合并。PR #40 改进后被成功合并，说明关闭原因可能是实现细节而非方向问题
implications: 不要因一次关闭而气馁 - 迭代改进可以成功
检查关闭的 PR 是否有可改进的地方
PR #40 的成功证明了这一点

target.title: chore: fix clippy warnings across workspace

interactions.raw_content: No response yet - PR still open
interactions.analysis: PR #39 仍然开放中。clippy warnings 修复类 PR 通常优先级较低，作者可能在等待 CI 或有时间时 review
implications: clippy fixes 属于 maintenance 类型，不紧急
可以继续其他更有影响力的功能开发

preferences_observed: values quick fixes and responsiveness (PR #40 'quick fix')
willing to admit own oversights (shows humility and openness)
green_flags: shows humility by admitting missed issues

for_future_prs: Maintain the code quality level demonstrated in PR #37-41
Focus on bug fixes and practical improvements (high merge rate)
Iterate quickly if a PR is closed - improved versions get accepted (PR #38 → #40)
Look for subtle bugs that maintainers might miss (PR #41 pattern)
Expect very fast response (< 24h) for quality contributions
Include clear explanation of what was missed/found

evidence: Sentiment intensity increasing ('looks good' → 'really nice work' → 'good catch!')
Author showing more personal engagement ('I totally missed that')
100% merge rate on last 2 reviewed PRs (#37, #40)
trend_analysis.prediction: Next few PRs likely to receive similarly warm reception if quality maintained

usage_notes:
此文件由 Agent 在消费通知时自动更新。其他 AI 可读取此文件了解：

2. 常见的反馈模式
3. 项目发展方向暗示
4. 沟通风格和响应速度
